title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · Behavior Brief: Prototype Pollution
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js prototype pollution increment in a validated service-record domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Validate external keys and use safe containers or allowlists to prevent prototype-pollution paths.
Apply preventExtensions, seal, freeze, or immutable update patterns at deliberate ownership boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
